segments.text: At the very outset, we have to know what
We are seeking.
You're seeking that truth but
What is The Truth?
The Truth Is
That
We Are Not This Body
.We Are not
These Emotions
,This Intellect
this Ego
these Conditionings
But We Are
the Spirit, a pure spirit.
This is one truth about ourselves
The second One Is that we are
Can you hear Me there? can You Hear?
We Are
No Better
Connection has to be There
There is A subtle Power which is described as an All-pervading power of God's love
As parama chaitanya, as gudrana – so many other words have been used for this power
which does all the living work like we see these flowers are beautiful and there but
take them from granted.
We don't say how they've come form a little seed or blossoming in different colours
All this living work we take for granted.
We have also taken our evolution for granted
and everything that autonomous nervous system does
you are taking it for granted
It's a good thing in way
because there is too much of worry
and botheration if start thinking
why?
But,
There Is A Power
which Does all these things
Now when I am talking to You
It's not for blind people, but like scientists you must have an open mind to see
For yourself whatever I am saying is for the time being it can be
Like a hypothesis before and then
You Can See for Yourself Whatever i'm Saying Is true or Not
In all the scriptures there's one common thing described
whether they have talked of the forms or the formless,
that we've to seek The Eternal.
And whatever is transitory
it's used with full understanding in its balance
and this why are lost
where our balances were lost
So best thing get connection
With This Divine Power
which gives us all nourishment
All care
and all the knowledge that we have never known before.
And for this you can't pay,
You cant force it
,you cannot compel anyone
.You need to be absolutely free
because afterall
This is ultimate freedom
You have freedom because you become such a dynamic, compassionate wonderful personality
that just becomes transformed special glorious person.
Supposing we had to take our little box of television
to a village or some place where people have never seen it,
then they might say what is this? Why we brought these here.
But when you put them into the mains
You will realize that
They are quite surprised
That This Is Such A Dynamic Thing
In The Same Way We Have No Idea About Ourselves
We Are Not Aware As To What We Are
Human awareness takes you to all kinds of problems
and You do not know what is the solution
for these problem are.
Sometimes people ask Me,
Mother why God has created us?
If He had created
was there use this kind
a life that he's given as?
This just transition period
Just a transition
when this evolution
have achieve its end
And then it achieves
Its End
U R as promised in the
Kingdom Of God
and that's what has to happen.
It is not just talk, talk ,talk
it as work out
the experience have be there
And The Experience of Realization
Is described very clearly
in some of the scriptures
which says
That you've feel cool breeze
Of the Holy Ghost
In Sanskrit language
Adi Shankaracharya has described
As Sallilam Salleelam
Meaning Cool Breeze
Now this cool breeze is not chilling breeze nor it's a hot breeze, but the kind of
a cooling soothing effects that you feel all around yourself which we have never felt
before.
You've ever felt their existence or these all-pervading power where it is there and
one has to seriously think about them – its nothing frivolous as I was also born in
Christian family. So Sunday morning get ready, go to church and meet few people hello-hello

those who say

what powers they have got and what transformation
